_note: Label Sprint round for chromosome — generated chromosome_illus.webp, cropped/keyed dark mode.
caption: Tap each label, then tap where it belongs on the chromosome.

hotspots.label: Centromere
hotspots.detail: The constricted region joining the two sister chromatids.

hotspots.label: Telomere
hotspots.detail: The protective cap at each end of a chromatid.

hotspots.label: Sister chromatid
hotspots.detail: One of two identical copies of the chromosome, joined at the centromere.

hotspots.label: Sister chromatid
hotspots.detail: The other identical copy, joined to its twin at the centromere.

hotspots.label: Chromatid arm
hotspots.detail: One of the two arms extending from the centromere.
